description: BOJACK High Quality Ceramic Tube Cartridge Fuses Assortment Kit Fuse Dimension:6.3x25 mm /0.25x1Inch Fuse Voltage: 240 V Packing quantity: 64pcs Fuses Package Quantity BS1362------3A------ 20PCS BS1362------5A------ 20PCS BS1362-----10A----- 20PCS BS1362-----13A----- 20PCS The role of the fuse：When a circuit malfunctions or is abnormal, the current is constantly rising, and the increased current may damage some important components or valuable components in the circuit, or it may burn the circuit or even cause a fire.The fuse will cut off the current when the current abnormally rises to a certain height and a certain time, thereby protecting the safe operation of the circuit.
